meta.title: Data Science Online Course with Certification | Teksversity
meta.description: Build job-ready skills with Teksversity’s Data Science Online Course covering analytics, machine learning, AI, real-world projects, and certification.

@graph.name: Data Science Certification Course
@graph.description: The Data Science Certification Course at Teksversity provides practical training in data analysis, statistics, and machine learning through hands-on projects and real-world problem solving.

mainEntity.name: What is the Data Science Certification Course about?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course teaches data science fundamentals including data analysis, statistics, and machine learning with hands-on projects and real-world datasets.

mainEntity.name: What skills are covered in the Data Science course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students learn data analysis, statistical methods, machine learning basics, and data-driven problem solving techniques used in industry analytics workflows.

mainEntity.name: Is this Data Science course suitable for beginners?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the program starts with foundational analytics and statistics concepts before progressing into applied machine learning and data science projects.

mainEntity.name: What career roles are available after Data Science certification?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can pursue roles such as Data Scientist, Machine Learning Associate, Data Analyst, AI Analyst, or Business Intelligence Analyst.

mainEntity.name: Does the Data Science course include practical projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, learners work on real-world datasets, analytics tasks, and applied machine learning projects to build practical experience.

content.value: The Online Data Science Certification Program is designed to help learners build a strong foundation in

, machine learning, and artificial intelligence. This course covers everything from data collection and visualization to model building and deployment. Through interactive online classes, real-time projects, and expert mentorship, students gain practical skills that are directly applicable in the industry. The flexible online format allows you to learn at your own pace while earning a globally recognized certification.

keyPoints: Master Big Data with Spark, Hadoop & AWS.
Build and deploy end-to-end ML models

heading: Why Choose the Data Science Certification Course at
Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity’s data science certificate online program redefines advanced learning through an AI-integrated approach that fuses Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and GenAI. Built for innovators, this curriculum transforms theory into impact with live data simulations, predictive analytics, and cloud-based AI projects. Learners experience a flexible yet rigorous online ecosystem enriched with real-time mentor interaction, adaptive AI labs, and outcome-driven modules designed for the next era of digital intelligence

description.firstDescription: The data science online course bridges academia and enterprise with hands-on exposure to MLOps, data visualization, and real-world deployment pipelines. Each learner engages in domain-based projects powered by automation, intelligent analytics, and cloud integration on platforms like AWS and Azure. With a focus on building problem-solving agility, Teksversity prepares students to engineer data solutions that mirror enterprise-level challenges bridging knowledge with innovation.

description.secondDescription: As an advanced certification in data science and AI, this program enables learners to master the future of analytics through ethical AI design, automation frameworks, and GenAI innovation. The data science and AI course empowers professionals with global credentials, placement guidance, and mentor-led career acceleration. Teksversity doesn’t just teach it transforms learners into AI powered strategists capable of designing intelligent systems that define tomorrow’s data-driven world.

keyPoints: Advanced AI and GenAI-integrated data science framework
Master ML, DL, NLP, and Data Engineering
Learn MLOps, cloud deployment, & real-time analytics
Work on live datasets & enterprise simulations
Build scalable ML models with TensorFlow & PyTorch
Explore Big Data, Spark, and AWS integration
Create a high-impact, industry-grade project portfolio
Learn from global AI & data science leaders
Get personalized feedback and performance insights
Gain real-world exposure through live case studies
Build professional portfolios with real-world projects
Global certification recognized by top employers
Unlock roles in AI, ML, and advanced analytics

sections.title: Global Market Revenue
sections.data: The global data science market is projected to reach $322.9 billion by 2026, growing at a CAR of approximately 27.7% from $95.3 billion in 2021 (Sources: MarketsandMarkets, Analytics Insight).

sections.title: Employment Growth
sections.data: The employment growth rate for data scientists is estimatedto be around 35% from 2022 to 2032, reflecting the increasing demand for these professionals.(Sources: MarketsandMarkets)

sections.title: Average Salary in India
sections.data: The average salary for data scientist in India is around 16,00,000 per annum. (Analytics Insight)

sections.title: Size of the Industry
sections.data: The Indian analytics industry is predicted to grow to about $119 billion by 2026.(sources: MarketsandMarkets)

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

hiringPartners.hiringPartnersSubheading: Get ready to grab your dream job! Join the talent pool with access to the world's best hiring companies.

faq.question: What is the Data Science Certification offered by Teksversity?
faq.answer: Teksversity’s Data Science Certification is a rigorous, career-oriented program that trains you in the latest data science methodologies, machine learning, and analytics tools empowering you to excel in high-growth, data-driven careers.

faq.question: Who can enroll in the Data Science Certification program?
faq.answer: This certification is open to graduates, working professionals, and career changers from IT, mathematics, statistics, and business backgrounds. No prior coding experience is needed just a passion for building a data-driven career.

faq.question: What tools and technologies will I learn in this Data Science Training?
faq.answer: You’ll gain hands-on experience with tools like Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and advanced machine learning algorithms, along with big data frameworks such as Hadoop and Spark.

faq.question: Is the Data Science Course available online?
faq.answer: Yes. Teksversity’s online course offers flexible learning from anywhere, featuring live interactive sessions and expert mentor support to help you advance your career.

faq.question: How long is the Data Science Certification?
faq.answer: The certification typically lasts 4 to 6 months, depending on your batch and learning format, providing comprehensive knowledge with flexible learning options.

faq.question: What career opportunities can I expect after completing the Data Science Training?
faq.answer: Graduates can pursue roles like Data Scientist, Data Analyst, Machine Learning Engineer, and Business Intelligence Analyst, all of which offer global demand and competitive salaries.

faq.question: Does Teksversity offer placement assistance after the Data Science Course?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer career support including mock interviews, resume building, and placement opportunities through our network of top industry recruiters.

faq.question: Will I get an industry-recognized certificate after the Data Science Course Online?
faq.answer: Yes. The Teksversity certification is globally recognized, enhancing your professional credibility and career prospects worldwide.

faq.question: Will I work on real-world projects during the Professional Data Science Course?
faq.answer: Yes. You’ll work on real-time data projects, case studies, and a comprehensive capstone project to build your portfolio and job readiness.

faq.question: Does Teksversity offer weekend or flexible learning options for the Data Science Course?
faq.answer: Yes. We provide weekend batches and self-paced modules to accommodate working professionals and students with busy schedules.
